kalshi-001.summary: After search_markets surfaced KXMAMDANIEO as candidate series, loop terminated without calling resolve_slug or get_markets({seriesTicker}).

kalshi-005.summary: Used category='Politics' instead of 'Elections' and probability='coinflip'/'unlikely' instead of numeric 10-40% band filter.

kalshi-008.summary: Economics slippage/depth query never fanned out get_market_orderbook across candidates to compute $-depth per cent.

kalshi-011.summary: Called get_market({ticker:'KXOAIANTH-40'}) and get_market_candlesticks({ticker:'KXOAIANTH-40'}) on EVENT-shape tickers. get_market fell through to Strategy 2's /-0+\d*$/ regex (doesn't match -40/-30), wasted 4 calls before resolve_slug recovery. get_market_candlesticks returned a 124-byte empty /markets/candlesticks response silently.
kalshi-011.trainFixHypothesis: Detect event-ticker shape /^KX[A-Z0-9]+-\d+$/ in handleGetMarket and handleGetMarketCandlesticks. On 404 (get_market) or shape-detection (candlesticks), auto-fetch /events/{ticker}?with_nested_markets=true and return a structured response listing child markets + recoveryHints.nextTools pointing at the correct per-child call. Saves 4+ wasted calls and preserves budget for reconstruction.

kalshi-013.summary: Metrics named in query didn't all appear as columns in result table before naming a winner.

kalshi-014.summary: Many candidates share identical floor prices; synthesis didn't distinguish 'true minimum-tick orderbook' from 'no-bid fallback'.

kalshi-016.summary: Re-ran discovery tools on same category 3× instead of partitioning budget and probing orderbook depth per candidate.

kalshi-018.summary: 30-day MA query never called get_market_candlesticks with periodInterval=1440 on candidates.

tool_selection_error.skipReason: Holdout-only — would constitute fitting to the generalization set.

data_accuracy_issue.note: Would be picked if argument_or_extraction_error were unavailable.

iterative_recovery_failure.skipReason: Iteration 2 already fixed recoveryHints for this category; task brief says 'STRONGLY CONSIDER avoiding this category again unless you have a materially new hypothesis'. No materially new hypothesis this iteration beyond what iter2 already tried.

fixPlan.contributorReason: The failing pattern (event-ticker shape KX<SERIES>-<N>) is Kalshi-specific — hardcoding this in shared runtime would not be contributor-agnostic. Other venues (Polymarket, Hyperliquid) have entirely different ticker grammars.

changes.edit: Before falling through to Strategy 4 (fuzzy market search), add a Strategy 2.5 that detects event-ticker shape /^KX[A-Z0-9]+-\d+$/ and, if matched, fetches /events/{ticker}?with_nested_markets=true. On success, return a structured response with kind='event_ticker_not_market', childMarkets list, and recoveryHints.nextTools suggesting get_market({ticker: <child>}) and get_market_candlesticks({ticker: <child>, periodInterval: 1440}) per child.

Before issuing the /markets/candlesticks batch call, detect event-ticker shape /^KX[A-Z0-9]+-\d+$/ without child suffix. If matched, auto-fetch the event via /events/{ticker}?with_nested_markets=true and return a structured error with kind='event_ticker_not_market', childMarkets, and recoveryHints.nextTools suggesting per-child get_market_candlesticks calls.
New helper that returns true when the ticker matches the event-shape pattern and is NOT a market ticker (no trailing letter suffix after the numeric tail).

skippedRootCauseCategories.reason: Holdout-only (kalshi-008, kalshi-018) — targeting would overfit to generalization set.
Fixed in iter2 (recoveryHints); kalshi-001/016 residuals need materially new hypothesis which is not yet identified.
Lower priority (priorityRank=4) than argument_or_extraction_error; only 1 train weak query (kalshi-014).

expectedImpact.primary: kalshi-011 (train): eliminate 4 wasted calls chasing ticker-shape errors; preserve budget so reconstruction from candlesticks completes within budget. Expected satisfaction lift: +0.5 to +1.0.
expectedImpact.generalization: Any other prompt that passes a KX*-<N> event ticker to get_market or get_market_candlesticks will now auto-resolve to child tickers instead of burning calls. Could help kalshi-003 (event trajectory) and kalshi-006 (event fan-out) indirectly if they ever hit event-shape first.
expectedImpact.differentiation: Indirect — by freeing up budget in event-ticker queries, more time is available for orderbook depth/candlesticks drill-downs that free LLMs cannot match.
